name: windows-computer-use
description: Windows Computer Use for Codex using UI Automation, screenshots, and MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Control Windows desktop apps through UI Automation.
interface.longDescription: Windows Computer Use gives Codex an MCP-backed desktop control surface for Windows. It captures screenshots, reads the UI Automation tree, clicks, types, scrolls, drags, invokes controls, and sets editable values for scoped GUI workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Windows Computer Use to inspect the active app.
Click through this Windows UI and report what fails.
Read the active window accessibility tree.
